result.stdout:
DotNet Do [the do]
  The DotNet CLI task runner. 
  1.3.1.0

Usage:
  dotnet do <task> [<args>...]
  dotnet do <option>

Options:
  --list		List all available tasks
  --create		Create a new dotnet-tasks.yml
  --version		Show version information
  -?, -h, --help	Show help and usage information
